job_description:
Content & Thought Leadership Specialist

The Content & Thought Leadership Specialist will be responsible for developing and maintaining the written voice of 2Base Technologies. This role goes beyond content scheduling and production. It focuses on creating high-quality, insight-driven content that reflects genuine expertise in technology and digital transformation. The specialist will translate complex technical concepts into clear, valuable insights that resonate with senior decision-makers such as CTOs, COOs, and technology leaders.

Key Responsibilities:

Long-Form Content Development - Create high-quality long-form written content including pillar pages, blogs, playbooks, frameworks, and use-case libraries. - Translate complex technology topics into content that is clear, insightful, and relevant for business and technology leaders. - Ensure content provides practical value and thought leadership, not generic summaries.

Founder Thought Leadership Content - Ghostwrite LinkedIn posts and thought leadership content for the founder. - Capture and maintain the founder’s voice while translating insights into engaging professional content. - Work closely with leadership to ensure authenticity and alignment with real experiences from project delivery.

Content Voice & Quality Ownership - Maintain and enforce the 2Base content voice and quality standards across all written materials. - Review and audit written content before publication to ensure clarity, accuracy, and alignment with brand positioning. - Act as the final quality checkpoint for written content before publishing.

Content Brief Development - Prepare structured content briefs that clearly define the topic, intent, audience, and messaging. - Ensure briefs are detailed enough for other team members to develop initial drafts without ambiguity. - Collaborate with the marketing team to align content with campaign and growth objectives.

AI-Assisted Content Development - Utilize AI tools to support research and drafting while maintaining full editorial control over the final output. - Develop structured prompts and workflows that improve writing efficiency without compromising quality. - Edit and refine AI-assisted drafts to meet publication standards.

Email and Outreach Copy - Write email nurture sequences aligned with marketing campaigns and lead nurturing strategies. - Develop outbound messaging templates used by the outreach team for cold communication initiatives. - Ensure messaging remains consistent with brand voice and strategic positioning.

Requirements:

Required Skills & Expertise - Strong experience writing B2B content, ideally within technology, SaaS, or professional services - Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear, engaging written content - Understanding of SEO fundamentals and search intent-driven writing - Experience writing long-form content such as blogs, guides, and thought leadership articles - Ability to adapt writing style and write in different voices, including ghostwriting for executives - Strong editing skills and attention to detail in maintaining content quality and brand consistency - Familiarity with AI writing tools and the ability to use them effectively while maintaining editorial control - Strong research ability and curiosity about technology, AI, and business operations

Education - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Communications, Journalism, Marketing, English, Technology, or a related field - Relevant certifications or training in content marketing, technical writing, or digital marketing will be an added advantage

Experience - 4 – 6 years of experience in B2B content writing - Experience creating technology or business-focused content - Experience writing long-form articles that contributed to organic traffic, engagement, or lead generation - Prior experience ghostwriting for senior leaders or executives will be an advantage - Familiarity with SEO-based content development and search intent

Benefits - A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Develops high-quality, thought leadership content for 2Base Technologies, translating technical concepts into insights for senior leaders. Requires 4-6 years of B2B content writing experience with SEO and AI tool proficiency.

job_description:
Organic Growth & SEO Specialist

The Organic Growth & SEO Specialist will be responsible for building and managing the company’s organic search growth engine. This role ensures that the company’s content and digital assets are structured to attract relevant organic traffic from search engines. The specialist will design and manage the architecture that determines which pages are created, what search intent they target, how they are structured, and how they connect through internal linking. This is a strategic and technical role, not simply a content support role. The position requires a professional who understands how to combine search intent, technical SEO, and structured content architecture to create long-term organic growth. The role reports to the Marketing & Growth Lead and works closely with the Content & Thought Leadership Specialist, design team, and development team to ensure the website performs effectively as a search-driven growth platform.

Key Responsibilities

  • Organic Growth Strategy: Develop and execute the company’s organic search growth strategy for key international markets. Identify high-impact opportunities to increase organic visibility and website traffic. Build a long-term roadmap that enables compounding organic growth over time.
  • Keyword Research & Search Intent Mapping: Conduct keyword research aligned with the company’s services and target markets. Map keywords based on search intent, business relevance, and conversion potential. Prioritize keywords that reflect high commercial or solution-oriented intent.
  • Page Architecture & SEO Structure: Design the SEO architecture of the website, including which pages should exist and how they connect. Define page structures that support strong rankings and clear user journeys. Develop and manage internal linking strategies to strengthen search visibility and content discoverability.
  • On-Page SEO Optimization: Implement on-page SEO best practices across all published pages. Optimize titles, headings, meta descriptions, and internal links to improve search rankings. Ensure content pages align with search intent and technical SEO standards.
  • Technical SEO Oversight: Work closely with the development team to ensure strong technical SEO performance. Monitor and improve site crawlability, indexing, and page performance. Oversee improvements related to site speed, structured data, and Core Web Vitals.
  • SEO Performance Monitoring: Monitor website performance using tools such as Google Search Console and analytics platforms. Identify ranking opportunities, indexing issues, and performance improvements. Provide regular insights and recommendations based on SEO data.
  • Programmatic SEO Development: Design frameworks for scalable programmatic SEO initiatives. Support the creation of structured page templates that allow expansion of content coverage across multiple topics and industries. Ensure programmatic pages maintain strong SEO standards and content relevance.
  • Collaboration With Marketing Team: Provide structured SEO briefs to the Content Specialist to guide content creation. Collaborate with designers and developers to ensure SEO-friendly page layout and implementation. Review and approve link-building targets identified by outreach teams.

Requirements

  • Required Skills & Expertise:
  • Strong understanding of organic growth strategies and search engine optimization
  • Experience performing keyword research and search intent analysis
  • Ability to design and manage SEO architecture and internal linking structures
  • Strong knowledge of on-page SEO and technical SEO principles
  • Experience working with tools such as Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and SEO research tools
  • Understanding of programmatic SEO and scalable content frameworks
  • Ability to translate SEO insights into clear and actionable content briefs
  • Analytical mindset with strong attention to detail
  • Ability to collaborate with marketing, design, and development teams
  • Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Digital Marketing, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field. Certifications in SEO, digital marketing, or analytics tools will be considered an advantage.
  • Experience: 4 – 6 years of experience in SEO or organic growth roles. Experience working on B2B services, technology, or SaaS-related SEO projects. Proven track record of contributing to or achieving search ranking improvements and organic traffic growth. Experience handling technical SEO requirements and website performance optimization. Exposure to international markets such as the US or UK will be an added advantage.

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Strategic SEO specialist to design and execute organic growth strategies, optimize technical SEO, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive international traffic and rankings.

A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously. If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.

job_description:
Associate - QA Engineer

We are seeking a detail-oriented Associate QA Engineer with 1–3 years of hands-on experience in software testing to join our QA team. In this role, you will ensure the quality and reliability of web and mobile applications by participating in test planning, test case creation, test execution, and defect tracking. You will collaborate with developers, project teams, and senior QA engineers to understand requirements, identify risks, and validate application functionality across diverse scenarios. The ideal candidate should possess a strong testing mindset, attention to detail, and the ability to identify edge cases and potential product issues.

Key Responsibilities

  • Review BRD, SRS, user stories, and functional specifications to understand system requirements.
  • Translate requirements into structured test scenarios and documented test cases for comprehensive coverage.
  • Perform functional, regression, and exploratory testing for web and mobile applications across browsers, devices, and environments.
  • Identify edge cases, alternate flows, and boundary conditions to validate system behavior beyond standard use cases.
  • Log, document, and track defects with clear reproduction steps, evidence, and severity classification using defect management tools.
  • Validate bug fixes and perform regression testing to ensure stability during releases.
  • Maintain test documentation, execution reports, and QA artifacts for traceability and quality tracking.
  • Support test summaries, progress updates, and QA reports during development and release cycles.
  • Collaborate with business analysts, developers, project managers, and senior QA engineers to clarify requirements and resolve issues.
  • Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies (sprint planning, daily stand-ups, sprint reviews).
  • Perform basic API validation and data verification for integration-level system behavior.
  • Own assigned modules/features to ensure testing completeness and readiness for release.
  • Contribute to improving test coverage, testing approaches, and QA processes.
  • Test AI-powered/data-driven features by validating output accuracy, response consistency, and system behavior.
  • Learn automation fundamentals, structured testing techniques, and emerging QA tools like AI testing practices.

Required Skills & Mindset

  • Strong attention to detail and structured thinking.
  • Willingness to deeply understand business logic before testing.
  • Ability to identify edge cases and risks beyond happy paths.
  • Analytical mindset to question unexpected system behavior.
  • Clear written and verbal communication for collaboration.
  • Strong documentation skills for defect reporting and test case writing.
  • Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment.
  • Solid understanding of functional, regression, integration, and exploratory testing.
  • Experience with test case design techniques.
  • Familiarity with bug tracking and test management tools.
  • Basic exposure to API testing (Postman, REST Assured).
  • Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies and QA’s role in sprints.
  • Familiarity with AI-assisted testing.

Good to Have

  • Basic awareness of performance and security testing.
  • Interest in learning automation frameworks (Selenium, Playwright, Cypress).
  • Basic scripting knowledge in Python, JavaScript, or Java.
  • Exposure to AI-enabled applications (chatbots, recommendation engines) and testing aspects like prompt variations and edge case validation.
  • Awareness of modern QA practices (continuous testing, test data management).
  • Ability to use AI-assisted tools for test case generation and productivity improvements.
  • Experience with mobile application or cross-platform testing (Appium).
  • Risk-based testing and prioritization mindset.
  • Commitment to continuous learning and staying updated on QA tools/methodologies.
  • ISTQB or equivalent testing certification.

Education & Experience

  • 1–3 years of experience in software testing.
  • B.Tech in IT, CS, or MCA.

Contact: For inquiries, email your resume to careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: The Associate QA Engineer role involves testing web and mobile applications through manual and automated methods, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and ensuring product quality via rigorous testing, defect tracking, and process improvement.

job_description:

job_description:
Senior Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modelling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

  • Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly.
  • Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement.
  • Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding.
  • Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies.
  • Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations.
  • Translate business processes into functional logic that development teams can execute.
  • Decompose requirements into use-case flows, system behaviours, edge cases, alternate paths, validation rules, and dependencies.
  • Prepare high-quality documentation, including BRD, FRD, SRS, workflows, state diagrams, data-flow diagrams, API requirement specs, and acceptance criteria.
  • Ensure all documentation is clear, logical, structured, testable, and ready for developers and QA to use.
  • Collaborate closely with developers, architects, QA, and product owners to validate feasibility and align understanding.
  • Ensure QA teams can derive test cases effectively from your functional logic and acceptance criteria.
  • Communicate confidently with clients, handle requirement discussions smoothly, and clarify misunderstandings immediately.
  • Push back politely on unclear or changing requirements and ensure final decisions are documented properly.
  • Maintain requirement traceability throughout the lifecycle and ensure zero ambiguity during handover to development.
  • Own the entire requirement lifecycle from discovery to development readiness with high accountability.
  • Drive clarity across teams by ensuring every requirement is complete, validated, and logically consistent.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Minimum 4+ years of core Business Analyst experience with strong analytical and system-level thinking.
  • Ability to break down complex requirements into clear components, workflows, and functional logic.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication with confidence in client interactions and clarifications.
  • Proven experience in preparing SRS, BRD, FRD, workflows, and acceptance criteria with high clarity.
  • Ability to challenge assumptions politely, ask the right questions, and ensure zero ambiguity.
  • Strong collaboration experience with development, QA, architects, and cross-functional teams.
  • Understanding of API behaviours, integrations, data flows, and multi-module system interactions.
  • Ability to run requirement discussions, workshops, and independently lead discovery sessions.
  • Exposure to SaaS, scalable products, automation, or AI-supported systems is an added advantage.
  • Demonstrated ownership of requirements end-to-end, ensuring developer-ready and testable outputs.

  • 4 to 8 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst

  • Exposure to AI/Automation, integrations, or multi-module systems

Fieldwork & Primary Research - Assist with on-ground fieldwork including stakeholder interviews and competitor research - Support the mapping of local and regional market dynamics relevant to ongoing consulting projects - Document field observations systematically and report findings accurately

Writing & Documentation - Draft research briefs, strategy memos, case study summaries, and project reports - Assist in preparing presentations, decks, and client-facing deliverables - Maintain accurate and up-to-date documentation for all ongoing research projects

AI & Modern Tools Proficiency (Strongly Encouraged)

Way.com — America’s dominant automotive super app, powering every mile for over 10 million customers—from auto insurance and parking to EV charging and more. Leveraging cutting-edge AI, machine learning, and advanced data analytics, we deliver innovative, personalized solutions that transform car ownership. Featured by Bloomberg and ranked 48th on Andreessen Horowitz’s Marketplace list of fastest-growing companies worldwide and recognized as the top Product in Insurance by UnitQ, we’re making car ownership easier, more affordable, and more rewarding.

Job Title

QA Manager

Experience

15+ Years

Work Arrangement

On-site

Employment Type

Full-time

Role Overview

We are seeking a highly experienced and visionary QA Leader (Automation) with 15+ years of expertise in quality engineering, automation strategy, and leadership across enterprise-scale systems. This role demands deep technical competence, cross-functional influence, and a strategic mindset to drive test automation maturity across platforms, teams, and geographies. You will own the quality roadmap, architect robust test automation ecosystems, and lead a team of engineers to ensure world-class delivery standards for highly scalable and secure digital platforms.

Key Responsibilities

  • Define and execute the long-term QA automation vision and roadmap across product lines.
  • Build and lead a high-performing global QA organization, with emphasis on scalable test automation.
  • Architect enterprise-grade automation frameworks across UI, API, Mobile, and Data layers.
  • Lead governance for quality assurance practices including functional, performance, security, and compliance testing.
  • Collaborate closely with engineering, product, DevOps, compliance, and business teams to align quality initiatives with business goals.
  • Drive test maturity models, automation coverage benchmarks, and release confidence metrics.
  • Provide thought leadership on tools, technologies, and best practices in the automation and quality space.
  • Build automation into CI/CD pipelines for faster, reliable, and repeatable deployments.
  • Monitor and report on quality KPIs, defect trends, and production incidents to drive preventive action.
  • Mentor and develop QA leaders and engineers across locations, fostering a culture of ownership and innovation.

Required Skills & Experience

  • 15+ years of experience in QA/testing, with a strong focus on test automation and at least 5+ years in a senior leadership role.
  • Proven experience building automation teams and strategies from the ground up in mid-to-large scale organizations.
  • Deep hands-on expertise in test automation tools and frameworks: Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, Appium, Rest Assured, etc.
  • Proficient in modern programming/scripting languages: Java, Python, JavaScript, or similar.
  • Strong understanding of Agile, DevOps, and Shift-Left testing methodologies.
  • Experience with CI/CD tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI.
  • Familiarity with cloud-based platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Exposure to compliance and regulatory testing (PCI-DSS, SOC2, ISO 27001) is highly desirable.
  • Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, including executive-level reporting.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Domain expertise in Fintech, Banking, SaaS, or other regulated industries.
  • Experience with AI-driven testing, predictive quality analytics, or model-based testing approaches.
  • ISTQB Advanced Certification or equivalent credentials.
  • Proven track record of scaling QA practices in multi-product or platform environments.

Why You Will Love Working With Us

  • Opportunity to work for the #1 Auto Super app in the US.
  • Opportunity to make a meaningful impact across 10+ million users.
  • Dynamic, fast-paced, and innovation-driven work culture.
  • Clear pathways for career growth in a rapidly scaling technology company.
  • Competitive compensation.

Apply Now

Apply Here

Contact

Email: careers@way.com Website: www.way.com

Job Dates

  • Closing Date: April 30, 2026
  • Published: March 17, 2026
